name: poly_bevel_corner
description: Polygon Bevel (mesh.bevel, edit-mode Polygons) at a 3-FACE CORNER JUNCTION -- the poly-bevel analog of edge_bevel_corner.json. The three cube faces (+X, +Y, +Z) that all meet at one corner are beveled together (grouped/shared-corner accumulator), inset=0.15, shift=0.1. Reference topology: 8v/6f -> 14v/12f, ALL 12 faces are quads -- the shared corner collapses to ONE new apex vertex (pushed OUTWARD along the diagonal by the shift, e.g. (0.5,0.5,0.5) -> (0.6,0.6,0.6) for these params) with 3 clean bridging quads closing the gap; NO extra triangle/pentagon fill is needed here, unlike edge_bevel_corner.json's edge-junction cap (triangle+3 quads) -- a genuine, verified CONTRAST between how the two bevel kinds close a 3-way corner. IMPORTANT GAP found while preparing this fixture: vibe3d's CURRENT bevelFacesByMask (source/mesh.d ~8039) processes each selected face STRICTLY INDEPENDENTLY (own inset/shift from its own corners only) -- there is no shared-corner accumulator in the current kernel, and mesh.bevel's params() does not even expose a `group` toggle for Polygons mode. This CONTRADICTS the private capture harness's own README claim that vibe3d's grouped poly-bevel already matches the reference bit-for-bit (solve3x3LeastSquares accumulator) -- that description evidently describes an EARLIER/GPL implementation that predates the clean-room bevel rewrite and has not been reinstated. This fixture's `op` step therefore uses an ASPIRATIONAL `group` param (not yet wired) as the specification for what the command should accept once the accumulator is (re)implemented -- do not expect it to run correctly against today's command surface.
source: Frozen reference-editor capture via the private capture harness's existing polygon-bevel op (already used by other grouped-poly-bevel cases), task 0391 addition case poly_bevel_three_faces_corner_grouped.json: the +X/+Y/+Z cube faces sharing corner (0.5,0.5,0.5), insert=0.15, shift=0.1, group=true.

provenance.harness: private capture harness (reference-editor polygon-bevel tool, driven headlessly)
provenance.notes: vibe3d's bevelFacesByMask has NO shared-corner accumulator today (per-face independent only) and mesh.bevel's params() does not expose `group` for Polygons mode -- this fixture's op step names the future param as a spec, not a working call against the current command surface. Expect FAIL until both the accumulator and the param wiring land.
